title: Practice Exercises
description: Extra practice: color choices, gradients, and reading shape parameters.

flashcards.definition: Good design uses contrast so important objects stand out from the background.
flashcards.example: # Light stars on a dark sky are easier to see

quiz.prompt: If the background is dark, which star color will usually be easiest to see?
options: A light color (like white or yellow)
quiz.feedbackIncorrect: High contrast helps—light objects show up on dark backgrounds.
